calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-08-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-22-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-01-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Boessenecker, via ZOOM, for the San Francisco Public Administrator ("SFPA"), Petitioner; Charlotte Singleton-Pooler and Emmanuel Pooler, via ZOOM, Interested Parties.

Ms. Boessenecker reports receiving a call from Anthony Pooler wherein he confirmed the family tree and that she filed a declaration wherein the preceding is specified. The court summarizes the relationship of Mr. Pooler to the decedent and confirms that there are no appearances to object to the SFPA's petition. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. The San Francisco Public Administrator is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Mar-14-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two-weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. Counsel requests a date for Status on Close of Estate a few months further than the date proposed by the court. The court advises Ms. Boessenecker that it will consider her request.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.

***After Hearing: The court grants counsel's request re: Status On Close of Estate. The Status is set for Jun-13-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.
EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
